query: TITLE-ABS-KEY(("cool roof*" OR "green roof*" OR "living roof*" OR "reflective roof*" OR "white roof*" OR "vegetated roof*" OR "extensive green roof*" OR "intensive green roof*" OR "rooftop garden*" OR "cool roofing" OR "green roofing") AND ("urban heat island*" OR UHI OR "heat exposure" OR "thermal exposure" OR "temperature exposure" OR "ambient temperature" OR "heat stress" OR "heat-related illness*" OR "heat-related mortality" OR "heat-related morbidity" OR "thermal comfort" OR "building performance" OR "energy efficiency" OR microclimate* OR "surface temperature" OR "air temperature" OR "cooling effect*" OR "temperature reduction" OR "thermal mitigation" OR "climate adaptation" OR "heat mitigation" OR "population health" OR "environmental health" OR "occupational health") AND ("randomized controlled trial*" OR RCT OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment*" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "instrumental variable*" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "propensity score" OR matching OR "causal inference" OR "impact evaluation" OR "intervention stud*" OR "experimental design" OR counterfactual* OR "treatment effect*" OR random* OR trial* OR evaluation OR impact* OR causal OR effect*))
